WordPress Job Application Forms ( Quick Setup )

Shaylee Hansen August 16, 2023September 8, 2023

Are you a WordPress website owner or manager, especially involved in recruitment? If you’re on the hunt for a seamless way to create a job application form with WordPress, look no further. Our WordPress form builder (download) is the ideal solution for HR professionals, talent acquisition teams, and anyone eager to upgrade their hiring process.

In this guide tailored for recruiters and website managers, we’ll walk you through using our pre-built WordPress form templates, particularly the job application form. The goal? Making form building a breeze even if you’re not a tech guru.

How to Seamlessly Create a Job Application Form with WordPress

Creating a production-ready job application form is easier than you think. Follow the two-step process below:

Step 1: Installing Ninja Forms

  1. Navigate to your WordPress Admin Menu.
  2. Click Plugins > Add New.
  3. In the Search Plugins field, type “Ninja Forms.”
  4. Click Install Now and then Activate.
  5. Alternatively, you can upload the plugin. For an in-depth process, check out our installation guide.

Step 2: Deploy the Job Application Form Template

  1. From the WordPress Dashboard, go to Ninja Forms > Add New.
  2. Choose the Job Application template.
  3. And voila! Your next move is to add this form to your WordPress page or post.

 

 

Hot Tip 🤯  – For sections that require multiple similar fields, use the Repeatable Fieldset. It improves user experience significantly.

Embedding the Job Application Form on Your WordPress Site

  1. Shortcode Method: Use this method to embed the form on any page or post.
  2. Block Method: Use the Block Inserter icon and search for Ninja Forms to visually place your form.
  3. Append a Ninja Form Method: Ideal if you want the form to appear at the bottom of your page or post.

Personalizing Your Job Application Form

Once your form is live, consider these customizations to enhance the user experience for your prospective candidates:

  1. Resume Uploads: Allow candidates to upload their resumes. With our File Uploads add-on, you can specify file types and rename uploaded files to make management easier.
  2. Dynamic Fields: Use our Conditional Logic add-on to show or hide application fields based on the applicant’s previous responses. This ensures candidates only fill out relevant sections.
  3. Save & Continue Later: Recognize the value of candidates’ time. With our Save Progress add-on, they can pause and return to complete the application later.

Building a Job Application Form with WordPress is easy! 

Recruitment is a crucial process, and the initial application can set the tone for the entire experience. As a WordPress website manager or recruiter, using our form generator ensures you provide a streamlined experience for job candidates. From file uploads and conditional logic to saved progress, our tools are designed to make your recruitment process efficient and user-friendly.

For those interested in an all-in-one package, our Plus Membership offers a slew of valuable add-ons and priority support. However, for those who prefer à la carte options, each of our add-ons is available separately, providing flexibility to match your needs. And remember, all our offerings come with a 14-day money-back guarantee. Dive in and transform your recruitment process today!

Try Ninja Forms Today
